access_token = result["access_token"]
# Authenticated API calls require access_token parameter
apis.spotify.follow_artist(artist_id=123, access_token=access_token)
# Check account (may require authentication - watch for 401 errors)
apis.spotify.show_account()
# Complete task via supervisor
apis.supervisor.complete_task(answer="Done")

# Pattern: Login to API and get access token
access_token = apis.spotify.login(username='user@example.com', password='password')['access_token']
# Pattern: Paginated API calls - iterate through all pages until empty
def get_all_items(access_token, api_call_func, *args, **kwargs):
items = []
page_index = 0
while True:
kwargs['access_token'] = access_token
kwargs['page_index'] = page_index
kwargs['page_limit'] = 20
result = api_call_func(*args, **kwargs)
if not result:
break
items.extend(result)
page_index += 1
return items

# Pattern: Get set intersection of IDs

# Login and get access token
result = apis.spotify.login(username="...", password="...")
access_token = result['access_token']
# Pass access_token to subsequent API calls
apis.spotify.show_song_library(access_token=access_token)
apis.spotify.show_liked_songs(access_token=access_token)
apis.spotify.show_downloaded_songs(access_token=access_token)
# Explore available APIs
apis.api_docs.show_api_descriptions(app_name='spotify')
apis.api_docs.show_api_doc(app_name='spotify', api_name='show_song_library')
# Get credentials from supervisor
apis.supervisor.show_account_passwords()
# Filter items using set operations
liked_song_ids = {s['song_id'] for s in liked_songs}
downloaded_song_ids = {s['song_id'] for s in downloaded_songs}
songs_to_keep = liked_song_ids.union(downloaded_song_ids)
library_song_ids = {s['song_id'] for s in song_library}
songs_to_remove = library_song_ids - songs_to_keep
# Album is downloaded if ALL songs in it are downloaded
album_downloaded = all(song_id in downloaded_song_ids for song_id in album['song_ids'])
# Iterate and remove items from library
for song_id in songs_to_remove:
apis.spotify.remove_song_from_library(access_token=access_token, song_id=song_id)
for album_id in albums_to_remove:
apis.spotify.remove_album_from_library(access_token=access_token, album_id=album_id)
# Complete task
apis.supervisor.complete_task()
